ConversationAction.text: Ah hello there! You must be the new chef? Welcome!
I'm chef Booger and I'll be teaching you how to keep your crew fed, but there's all kinds of folk around the station that can teach you things!
I'll be heading to the kitchen upstairs. You can meet me there if you want to start learning about preparing meals and other basic kitchen tasks.
Welcome to the kitchen! I'll do a quick rundown on things you'll usually find here, unless you're already familiar?
Gladly! Alright so...

Option.text: Yes, I'm already familiar. No need to explain.

ConversationAction.text: Very well! Let's not waste time then and onto the next lesson!
This is the refrigerator! It'll keep raw meat from spoiling and ice cream from melting. I've heard about desperate medics even storing organs in there to prevent them from decaying!

The refrigerator has an integrated backup-power battery which will last for 5 minutes during a power outage. Once the backup-power battery is drained, the contents inside the refrigerator will start to spoil so make sure to restore power within those 5 minutes to prevent spoilage, should you ever run into a power outage.

Here we have the kitchen counter. Should be in every kitchen. In there you can store whatever you need for meal preparation, but be aware that it is not water proof! It's best to store water sensitive things elsewhere. It is also where you'll install and uninstall your oven, stove, etc. from. It comes with power connectors so you can wire newly installed equipment directly to it.
If you've manually installed a kitchen counter, you can disassemble it again when holding a wrench while opening it up. The same goes for the kitchen pantry.
Speaking of the pantry. That's over there. Please come a bit closer.

The pantry is basically the same as the kitchen counter in almost every way, except it doesn't support all installations. For example you can't put an oven in there. But what it lacks in compatibility, it makes up for by offering more storage space. Compared to the kitchen counter, the pantry is water proof so you won't need to worry about water sensitive things reacting, if your submarine ends up flooding.
Here we've got a blender. Perfect for making glasses of all kinds of juice or shred someone's ID card, haha!

This is an electric grill. Technically you can also grill something in a pan on a stove, but the grill allows for larger quantities grilled at once. Simply put what you want to grill onto it and wait, but don't forget to check regularly and take it off the grill before it burns!

We also have a fryer, but I think it's still in the storage room. We'll set it up later, but basically it functions like the grill, except for frying food. You will need oil in the fryer to fry stuff, obviously. Just make sure to not accidentally pour water into the hot fryer oil or you get an unpleasant surprise!
Here's the oven. With it you'll do baking and roasting. Not much else to say about it.

This is the stove. You'll need a pot for cooking and a pan for frying. Without those the stove is basically useless, so make sure to put them on there. You can also put a kettle on there and brew some tea.
With the sink you'll be hand-washing dirty dishes and pots or refill bottles and pots with water. Keep in mind to clean things you'll also need a cleaning agent like ethanol.
On the cutting board you'll be chopping all the ingredients into shape and finalize some dishes. Make sure to stay on the chopping. It's not going to magically continue chopping if you walk away!
Oh hold on a second... I believe I heard a door. I think Someone is coming. Maybe your first customer?

ForceSay.message: Hey chef, when can we expect some meals? I'm hungry as hell!
No worries! We will have some meals prepared in just a moment. What would you like to eat?
Uhh... I think I'd like some Spaghetti and Minceballs please.
Very Well! Your dish will be ready shortly. Please take a seat outside while we prepare it.

ConversationAction.text: Well, as you've heard it is time to prepare a meal. Our customer was asking for Spaghetti and Minceballs. Let's start by preparing the stove. Go and grab the pot on the pantry over there to the left.

EventObjectiveAction.id: Collect the pot
Collect the pot

ConversationAction.text: Looks like the pot is dirty. We first need to clean it at the sink before we can cook with it. There should already be some ethanol in the sink for you to clean the pot with.

EventObjectiveAction.id: Clean the pot in the sink
Clean the pot in the sink

ConversationAction.text: Very good! Now we should fill the pot with water from the sink. We will need it later to boil the pasta.

EventObjectiveAction.id: Fill the pot with water
Fill the pot with water

ConversationAction.text: Perfect! Put the pot onto the stove for now. We'll come back to it later.
Ok, now we'll need to make some dough to create pasta from. Go ahead and grab the flour, the salt, a sea yeast shroom and a bottle of water from the kitchen counter.

EventObjectiveAction.id: Collect flour, salt, sea yeast shroom and a bottle of water from the kitchen counter
Collect flour, salt, sea yeast shroom and a bottle of water from the kitchen counter

ConversationAction.text: Wonderful! Go ahead and use them to prepare some dough at the cutting board.

EventObjectiveAction.id: Make some dough at the cutting board
Make some dough at the cutting board

ConversationAction.text: Very good! Now also at the cutting board you can make some pasta from that dough.

EventObjectiveAction.id: Make some pasta at the cutting board
Make some pasta at the cutting board

ConversationAction.text: I see you've got quite the talent! We will also need some meat, but it looks like we ran fresh out of it. We'll have to butcher a crawler to get some fresh meat. Here, take my spare cleaver and follow me.
Here we are. In here you'll find a crawler. Kill it, then slash your meat cleaver on its corpse to harvest meat. If you start hearing a strange noise, you've harvested all the meat.

EventObjectiveAction.id: Kill the crawler and harvest all of its meat
Kill the crawler and harvest all of its meat

ConversationAction.text: Very well done! Please follow me back to the kitchen so we can proceed with the meal preparation.
Time to chop the meat into smaller pieces! Use the cutting board to prepare some raw crawler meat which we will be using for the minceballs.

EventObjectiveAction.id: Prepare raw crawler meat at the cutting board
Prepare raw crawler meat at the cutting board

ConversationAction.text: Now it is time to start cooking! Grab an empty plate and a bottle of ketchup from the kitchen counter and put all your ingredients into the stove, then start cooking.

EventObjectiveAction.id: Prepare a meal: Spaghetti and Minceballs
Prepare a meal: Spaghetti and Minceballs

ConversationAction.text: You're a natural! Grab the meal and let's bring it to our customer. They must be ravenous by now, haha!

EventObjectiveAction.id: Give the meal to the hungry europan

ConversationAction.text: Oh finally! You got my food?

EventObjectiveAction.id: Give the meal to the hungry europan

ConversationAction.text: Thank you! Have a great day!
Uhm... And where exactly?

Option.text: Oh, my bad! Let me go grab it real quick. I'll be right back!
Sorry, I need a bit more time

ConversationAction.text: Ugh, fine! But please hurry! I'm starving...
Another satisfied customer! I think I hear someone. It might be the delivery guy...

ForceSay.message: Hey Booger, I got your delivery! Shall I stock up for you?
Oh hey! Yes please, that would be great!
Alright. I believe this goes here...
Hmm... These plates are dirty. I think they mixed something up during packaging... I'm very sorry! I'll take them back and bring the new ones next time.
It's ok. Leave them here. We can clean them.
If that's ok with you? I'll leave them here then. Have a pleasant day you two!

ConversationAction.text: That was Johnny Beaver Boob. He used to be my apprentice and we got up to some silly things like convincing our colleague Polly Crackle it is in her best interest to get her limbs removed, haha... hah... Sounds a bit messed up when I say it out loud... Hmm.
Well, we've got some more supplies now which is great for your training! I'm starting to get pekish, so your next task is to make me 3x Fried Hammerhead Spawn.
For this you will need a fryer and a wire. We should still have one of each out in the hallway. Please go and bring them here.

EventObjectiveAction.id: Collect the Fryer Installation and the Wire
Collect the Fryer Installation and the Wire
Bring the Fryer Installation and Wire to the Chef
Bring the Fryer Installation and Wire to the Chef

ConversationAction.text: Very good! Now simply plug the fryer installation into the kitchen counter to install it.
Perfect! Now you must connect it with the wire. You can hook it up directly to the kitchen counter. Here, take this screwdriver.

EventObjectiveAction.id: Connect the fryer to the power output of the kitchen counter
Connect the fryer to the power output of the kitchen counter

ConversationAction.text: Ok, now we can use the fryer. Go ahead and grab the cooking oil from the kitchen counter and 3 hammerhead spawns from the refrigerator.

EventObjectiveAction.id: Grab the cooking oil and 3 hammerhead spawns
Grab the cooking oil and 3 hammerhead spawns

ConversationAction.text: Good, now put them all into the fryer and don't forget to turn it on. Then we'll wait for it to fry.

EventObjectiveAction.id: Put the oil and hammerheads into the fryer and turn it on
Put the oil and hammerheads into the fryer and turn it on

ConversationAction.text: Seems like they're done. Time to get them out before they burn.

EventObjectiveAction.id: Collect the fried hammerhead spawns
Collect the fried hammerhead spawns

ConversationAction.text: Very good! Please give them to me, I've gotten quite hungry.
Ah, that hit the spot! But it made quite thirsty. You look quite thirsty too, actually...
Here, take these bottles and fill them at the sink. The sink has a built-in filter so the water is safe for consumption.

EventObjectiveAction.id: Fill 2 bottles with water at the sink
Fill 2 bottles with water at the sink

ConversationAction.text: Fresh, cold water. Please hand me a bottle.
Thanks, now go ahead and drink yours too. Hydration is important!

EventObjectiveAction.id: Open your bottle (Press [Aim]+[Select])
Drink (Hold [Aim])
Open your bottle (Press [Aim]+[Select])
Drink (Hold [Aim])

ConversationAction.text: Looks like you're ready to feed a whole crew! Now there's more to being a chef than just cooking. Visit my colleagues in their respective rooms and they'll gladly teach you a thing or two.
Do you know anything about plants? Most sailors have never seen a vegetable in their life.
It's quite simple really, you put a seed in a pot, water it a little and watch it grow. All you have to do is not set your submarine on fire.
What the... it looks like one of my plants just died. Replace it for me would you? Grab this seed, uproot the weeds and plant the seed.

EventObjectiveAction.id: Uproot the dead plant and plant the seed
Uproot the dead plant and plant the seed

ConversationAction.text: It will take a while for the plant to reach maturity. We can speed that up with a bit of fertilizer. And give it some water would you?

EventObjectiveAction.id: Use fertilizer on the new plant
Use fertilizer on the new plant
Water the other plant
Water the other plant

ConversationAction.text: Very good. It looks like our other plant just yielded a fruit. You know they're ripe when they fall on the floor, that's just how nature works.
Now come over here. I need to show you a fun project I've been working on: creating new species of fruit. I call them hybrids.
I've put two fruits inside that research station. Personnaly, I have no idea what to expect, so I'll let you press the button.

EventObjectiveAction.id: Use the research station to create a hybrid plant

ConversationAction.text: Never seen this one before! I'll have to grow it later. But enough talked about the house plants...
Now I want to introduce you to hydroponics. These devices recreate the growth environment of Europan native plants. All it takes is a bit of water, fertilizer and electricity.
Looks like this one is out of sea water. Remove that empty keg and grab the one by the door.

EventObjectiveAction.id: Remove the empty keg
Put the sea water keg inside the Hydroponic planter
Remove the empty keg
Put the sea water keg inside the Hydroponic planter

ConversationAction.text: And now we wait. It takes a while for plants to grow, so don't be in a rush.
Well it looks like you do have a green thumb after all! I've got nothing left to teach you. Before you leave, can you turn the sprinkler on?

EventObjectiveAction.id: Turn the automated sprinkler on.
Turn the automated sprinkler on.

ConversationAction.text: Hey there, you look dependable... and available. I hurt my hand the other day, wanna give brewing a try in my stead?
Alright. See that big white machine next to me? That's a state of the art industrial brewer. That's where the booze is made.
Let's gather some ingredients. A good beer starts with water. Grab that keg and fill it in that little pool. Inspection told me it's sanitary, so don't worry about dipping your toes in your drink.

EventObjectiveAction.id: Grab the keg and fill it with water from the pool
Grab the keg and fill it with water from the pool

ConversationAction.text: Great, now put that in the brewer.

EventObjectiveAction.id: Put the keg inside the brewing kettle
Put the keg inside the brewing kettle

ConversationAction.text: There should be more ingredients in that cabinet. Let's go with a simple recipe: Coalition Premium.

EventObjectiveAction.id: Brew a keg of Coalition Premium
Brew a keg of Coalition Premium

ConversationAction.text: That's what I like to see, freshly brewed liquor. Now pour me a bottle would you? There's a refill station, just load the keg in there.

EventObjectiveAction.id: Load the refill station with the keg of beer
Load the refill station with the keg of beer

ConversationAction.text: Yeah just pull on the lever and... what do you mean there are no bottles? Damnit. Don't worry, we can print some at the machine on my left.
Just rummage through the cabinet, you should be able to grab some glass fragments with your bare hands. Don't worry, insurance covers cuts and gashes.

EventObjectiveAction.id: Grab some glass fragments from the cabinet
Grab some glass fragments from the cabinet
Put the fragments inside the bottle printer
Put the fragments inside the bottle printer
Print 3 beer bottles
Print 3 beer bottles

ConversationAction.text: What are you waiting for? Pour me some beers!

EventObjectiveAction.id: Pour 3 bottles of Coalition Premium
Print 3 beer bottles

ConversationAction.text: At last, some refreshment. I've got nothing left to teach you. Leave one on the table before you leave!

EventObjectiveAction.id: Leave a beer on the table
Leave a beer on the table

ConversationAction.text: Hey I'm not slacking off okay? Just finished my shift at the red nose factory. Everyone deserves some rest and recreation. Do you never take time off?
Good. They say a happy fellow is a productive employee. If you never take a break, you'll get stressed, make mistakes, and even fall asleep from exhaustion.
Speaking of which, you look paler than a clown. You probably should take a nap. Don't just lie down, actually close your eyes and sleep those bags off your face.

EventObjectiveAction.id: Sleep in the bad to reduce your fatigue
Sleep in the bad to reduce your fatigue

ConversationAction.text: Damn, you're a snorer. Hey, a quick joke for you: why did the crawler not eat the clown? Because he tasted funny!
Tough crowd... Why are you frowning? I can sense a bit of a cortisol spike over here. Try playing the guitar, I hear music soothes the nerves.

EventObjectiveAction.id: Reduce your stress by playing the guitar
Reduce your stress by playing the guitar

ConversationAction.text: See, you feel better already! How about Hotdogs? Do you like Hotdogs? I can see it on your face, it's your favorite food! Here, grab the one on the table, it's my treat.

EventObjectiveAction.id: Eat the hotdog to satisfy your craving and reduce stress
Eat the hotdog to satisfy your craving and reduce stress

ConversationAction.text: I knew you'd enjoy the meal. Now, wanna see a magic trick? I'll make this stress disappear! ...with alcohol. The magic is alcohol. Just can just drink your stress away. I left you a rum bottle. Bottoms up!

EventObjectiveAction.id: Get drunk to reduce your stress
Get drunk to reduce your stress

ConversationAction.text: You're not walking right, which tells me you must be enjoying yourself. I've got nothing left to teach you, that's a job for the professors at the clown college. Now if you don't mind, I need to hone my honks.
